title: August 15
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|August}}

'''August 15''' is the 227th day of the year (228th in leap years). There are 138 days remaining.
</noinclude>
*[[1960s#1961|1961]] – [[Matt Johnson]] is born.
*[[1972]] – [[Matthew Wood]] is born.
*[[1976]] – [[Donald Mustard]] is born.
*[[1978]] – [[David Nakayama]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 77|''Star Wars Weekly'' 77]] published.
*[[1984]] – [[Return of the Jedi Weekly 61|''Return of the Jedi Weekly'' 61]] published.
*[[1986]] – [[Zachary Graves]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War 1|''Tales of the Jedi – The Sith War'' 1]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Jedi vs. Sith 5|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 5]] published.
*[[2003]] – [[Star Wars Insider 70|''Star Wars Insider'' 70]] released for subscribers.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Boba Fett: A Practical Man]]'' released.
*[[2008]] – [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (film)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']] released in theaters.
*[[2010]] – [[Celebration V]] ends.
*[[2011]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Clone Wars: Incredible Vehicles]]'' published.
*[[2016]] – "[[Showdown on Hoth]]" airs on [[Disney XD]].
*[[2017]] – "[[Free Fall]]" airs on Disney XD.
*[[2018]] – [[Beckett 1|''Beckett'' 1]] published.
*2018 – [[Poe Dameron 30|''Poe Dameron'' 30]] published.
*[[2023]] – [[Star Wars Insider 220|''Star Wars Insider'' 220]] published.
*2023 – ''[[The Old Republic: Fatal Alliance]]'' reprinted as part of ''[[The Essential Legends Collection]]''.
*2023 – [[Outbound Flight (novel)|''Outbound Flight'']] reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2023 – ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*2023 – ''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' reprinted as part of ''The Essential Legends Collection''.
*[[2024]] – "[[The Rustler Roundup / A New Discovery]]" aired on [[Disney Junior]].
